applied_optimizations.name: Triton softmax kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented Triton @triton.jit softmax kernel for training mode. Correct but adds ~0.06ms overhead due to kernel launch cost on small row sizes (K=32).

attempted_but_failed.name: Fused batchnorm+softmax Triton kernel
attempted_but_failed.reason: Kernel launch overhead dominates for small row sizes

attempted_but_failed.name: VLAD aggregation Triton kernel
attempted_but_failed.reason: Complex indexing patterns cause compilation errors on ROCm Triton
attempted_but_failed.error: Unsupported ptr type errors with 2D block loads

attempted_but_failed.name: Pure PyTorch (no Triton)
attempted_but_failed.error: Achieved 0.879ms (parity) but doesn't meet task requirement

top_bottlenecks: VLAD batched matmul (B x K x N) @ (B x N x D): ~35%

notes: Problem: B=2048, N=100, D=512, K=32, ghost_clusters=0
Root cause: Triton kernel launch overhead (~60us) dominates for elementwise ops on small dimensions (K=32)
The GEMM operations (75% of time) are already optimal in rocBLAS
This problem is compute-bound, not memory-bound, limiting fusion benefits
SCORE: 50.0 (correct but not faster than baseline)

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output — agent crashed/timed out for the 3rd consecutive time. With 40 minutes remaining, providing a near-complete code solution to prevent overthinking. The key optimization is f

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 5 produced no output — the agent has crashed 4 out of 5 trials. With 39 minutes remaining, providing an almost-complete solution to prevent overthinking. The key optimization is fusing BN+softma

global_notes: Task requires Triton kernels but this problem size doesn't benefit from them
Achieved correctness (5/5 trials pass) but not speedup
Further optimization would require problem sizes where memory bandwidth is the bottleneck
